evals.prompt: Create cute fan art for Ohyul from LNGSHOT. He's the leader and lead vocal. His vibe is warm and comforting. Use warm sunset colors.
evals.expected_output: A PNG character card illustration in cute hand-drawn style featuring Ohyul's name, his role as Leader/Lead Vocal, warm color palette, decorative elements like music notes and stars
expectations: Includes decorative elements like stars or music notes
Has a hand-drawn or sketched aesthetic quality

evals.prompt: Make fan art for Ryul, the main rapper of LNGSHOT. He's known as the flow king. Use cool, bold colors with a fiery vibe.
evals.expected_output: A PNG character card illustration in cute hand-drawn style featuring Ryul's name, his role as Main Rapper, bold/fiery color palette, decorative elements
expectations: Has a distinct visual personality from other member cards
